name: auto-work-harness-sandbox
_comment: Default-deny egress devcontainer for unattended agent runs. The agent runs as a non-root user; init-firewall.sh applies the allowlist with NET_ADMIN. This is what makes `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions` safe to run unattended.

customizations.comment: Credentials (GitHub token, API keys) are injected by the egress proxy OUTSIDE this container and never mounted here — the agent never sees a raw key.
